creator: wxs@atarininja.org
text:
On Mon, Jun 02, 2008 at 12:41:31PM +0100, Mark Round wrote:
> That patch didn't seem to fix things. After applying it, I still get
> the same error at the end of the build :
> 
> configure: error: The following required components noted earlier are missing:
>      libnet-devel
>     Please supply them and try again.
> gmake: *** [config.status] Error 1
> *** Error code 2
> 
> 
> An updated config.log from this run is at
> http://markround.com/static/config.log-postpatch.
> 
> However, making the additional change in the Makefile, so that :
> 
> LIBNET_CONFIG?= ${LOCALBASE}/bin/libnet11-config
> 
> Becomes :
> 
> LIBNET_CONFIG? = libnet11-config
> 
> As per my original patch seems to work, though.
> 
> -Mark

I sent the wrong patch.  Turns out I tested with the LIBNET_CONFIG
change by mistake.  I'm hesitant to make this change because every other
port specifies the full path to libnet1[01]-config.  I'm going to keep
investigating why this change is necessary, and see if I can't fix the
root-cause of it.

Sorry for the delay but I really don't think the proposed fix is
anything more than a band-aid.  While I'm not against committing it, I'd
prefer to see the root-cause fixed.

-- WXS
